response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Song 1 and Song 3 in the reference JSON did not match the actual performed songs in the audio ('Venom' and 'God-ish' were incorrect; the actual songs were 'Darling' by MARETU and 'We\'re All Brainless' by PinocchioP, respectively). Song 2 ('Tokimeki Diary') matched perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: The incorrect song lyrics from the reference JSON were discarded, and manual transcription was performed for 'Darling' and 'We\'re All Brainless'. For 'Tokimeki Diary', the reference lyrics were utilized and matched to the audio.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were synchronized precisely with the vocal performances, maintaining seamless transitions and short reading times. No subtitles were output during periods of instrumental break.

subtitles.original: ...も聞いてないって ダーリン
subtitles.english: ...You're not even listening, darling.

subtitles.original: ベターな恋愛 エラーな展開
subtitles.english: A better love, an error of a development.

subtitles.original: だってそれじゃつまんないでしょう
subtitles.english: Because that's just boring, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 踏みつけて 焼き付けて
subtitles.english: Step on me, burn it in...

subtitles.original: とろけそうな 酸素神経
subtitles.english: My oxygen nerves are about to melt.

subtitles.original: 壊れそうな 群本能
subtitles.english: My herd instinct is about to break.

subtitles.original: 崩れそうな 情を前に
subtitles.english: Faced with feelings about to collapse...

subtitles.original: 愛の脳内レボリューション
subtitles.english: An intracerebral revolution of love!

subtitles.original: ドッキドキメキ 気流に私は乗っている
subtitles.english: With a pounding heartbeat, I'm riding on the airflow!

subtitles.original: きっとね
subtitles.english: Surely.

subtitles.original: なんか 言葉にできない こと
subtitles.english: Something I can't put into words,

subtitles.original: ちょっと 心の臓 騒がす こと
subtitles.english: something that makes my heart flutter,

subtitles.original: なんとなく 今日を照らす こと
subtitles.english: something that vaguely lights up today...

subtitles.original: ちょっと 好みの花 見つけた！
subtitles.english: I found a flower I like!

subtitles.original: 白い霧 ばかり エブリデイ
subtitles.english: Every day is just filled with white fog,

subtitles.original: 探したいものさえ 探せないよ
subtitles.english: I can't even find what I'm looking for.

subtitles.original: わくわくした そうな ダイアリー
subtitles.english: An exciting-looking diary,

subtitles.original: 知らんぷりして 放り出すなんて
subtitles.english: to just pretend not to know and throw it away...

subtitles.original: ライヤイヤイヤイヤ
subtitles.english: La-iya-iya-iya...

subtitles.original: やるせなかった ハート
subtitles.english: My helpless heart.

subtitles.original: Wow wow wow wow
subtitles.english: Wow, wow...

subtitles.original: 「でも、だけど」から「きっと、可能性あり」
subtitles.english: From "but, still" to "surely, there's a possibility!"

subtitles.original: 気持ちいい風に 浮遊して
subtitles.english: Floating in a pleasant breeze,

subtitles.original: うんと すっと ちょっともっと いつかは飛べたらいいな！
subtitles.english: someday, a little more, I hope I can fly!

subtitles.original: ドッキドキメキ 気流に私は乗っている
subtitles.english: With a pounding heartbeat, I'm riding on the airflow!

subtitles.original: きっとね
subtitles.english: Surely,

subtitles.original: 分からない 物語に ビビらないで
subtitles.english: don't be afraid of a story you don't understand!

subtitles.original: キラキラ空想に 世界が踊る！
subtitles.english: The world dances in a sparkling fantasy!

subtitles.original: 笑って
subtitles.english: Just laugh!

subtitles.original: 縮こまってる 時間はないな
subtitles.english: There's no time to be cowering down!

subtitles.original: 私を知りたい！
subtitles.english: I want to know myself!

subtitles.original: 何もかもが まだ 分からない
subtitles.english: There's still so much I don't know...

subtitles.original: 私を見つけたい！
subtitles.english: I want to find myself!

subtitles.original: いってきますを 声にできたなら
subtitles.english: If I could say "I'm off!" out loud,

subtitles.original: ちょっとだけ 大人になったかもね
subtitles.english: maybe I've grown up just a little bit.

subtitles.original: チャッチャカチャカ 深呼吸
subtitles.english: Take a quick deep breath,

subtitles.original: 優しくあるたびに シッソク
subtitles.english: stalling every time I try to be kind.

subtitles.original: つまんない 僻地は 夢がない
subtitles.english: A boring, lonely place has no dreams,

subtitles.original: ちょっと 嫌いな自分 見つけた
subtitles.english: I found a side of myself I dislike.

subtitles.original: 黒い霧 覆う エブリデイ
subtitles.english: Every day covered in a dark fog,

subtitles.english: getting hit by rain makes me want to go home.

subtitles.english: An exciting-looking diary,

subtitles.english: I don't want to lose my favorite accessory!

subtitles.original: Wow wow wow wow
subtitles.english: Wow, wow...

subtitles.original: まだ何も分かっちゃいないんだ
subtitles.english: I still don't understand anything yet!

subtitles.original: Wow wow wow wow
subtitles.english: Wow, wow...

subtitles.original: 好きって気持ちに向かいたい
subtitles.english: I want to face my feelings of liking things!

subtitles.original: あの星のように 輝きたい
subtitles.english: I want to shine like that star!

subtitles.english: With a pounding heartbeat, I'm riding on the airflow!

subtitles.original: やっぱね
subtitles.english: I knew it,

subtitles.original: 答えのない 世界で生きてるせいです
subtitles.english: it's because I'm living in a world without answers.

subtitles.original: 未来は優秀にあっても変わんないし
subtitles.english: Even if the future is great, it won't change,

subtitles.original: 叫んで

subtitles.original: 私らしく体現！

subtitles.english: Beyond overcoming the pounding heartbeat airflow,

subtitles.original: Ah
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: ねえ、大切な話があるんだ
subtitles.english: Hey, there's something important I have to say,

subtitles.original: ここになく 探しものがあるんだ
subtitles.english: there's something I'm looking for that isn't here.

subtitles.original: だから旅に出ます
subtitles.english: So, I'm going on a journey,

subtitles.original: そのうち帰ります
subtitles.english: I'll return eventually.

subtitles.original: ちょっとだけ 大人になったかもね
subtitles.english: Maybe I've grown up just a little bit.

subtitles.english: We are all nonsense,

subtitles.english: The night breaks,

subtitles.english: waking up in the morning.

subtitles.original: 首痛める この身体に自分がいる
subtitles.english: My neck hurts; I am inside this body.

subtitles.original: 君と喋る
subtitles.english: Talking with you,

subtitles.english: eating a meal,

subtitles.original: 当たり前で受ける
subtitles.english: Taking it all for granted.

subtitles.english: The cat's name is somehow 'Tama',

subtitles.english: and the dog's is...
